scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tight uppercase italic
scale.caption: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500

buttons.primary: bg-brand text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 hover:bg-brand-600 transition-all shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(15,23,42,1)] active:translate-x-[2px] active:translate-y-[2px] active:shadow-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-asphalt text-asphalt font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 hover:bg-asphalt hover:text-white transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-asphalt hover:bg-slate-100 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide px-6 py-3

cards.event_card: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white border border-slate-200 hover:border-brand transition-colors duration-300 flex flex-col h-full
cards.feature_card: p-8 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 hover:shadow-lg transition-all

navigation.style: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-slate-200 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-white/60
navigation.link_style: text-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-brand transition-colors

hero.style: relative h-[80vh] w-full flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden bg-asphalt
hero.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-asphalt/90 via-asphalt/50 to-transparent z-10

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlays on dark sections to prevent banding.
visual_enhancers.gradients: No full gradients. Use gradients only for text-clip effects or subtle glows behind objects.
visual_enhancers.maps: Use 'react-leaflet' with custom minimal tiles (e.g., CartoDB Positron) to match the clean aesthetic.

do_not_use: Placeholder text 'Lorem Ipsum' (Use real sports copy)
must_do: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all numeric data (prices, distances, dates).
Ensure all maps have a 'View Route' full-screen option.
Show elevation gain prominently for trail/cycling events.

chatbot.name: Coach AI
chatbot.style: Floating Action Button (bottom-right), expands to a glassmorphism panel.
chatbot.avatar: Minimalist geometric icon or branded mascot.

recommendations.style: Carousel of 'Top Picks for You' based on user history.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'Barlow Condensed' via Google Fonts in index.css.
Set up Tailwind colors with the 'brand' and 'asphalt' palette defined above.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Navbar and Footer globally.
Implement the 'EventCard' component using the 'Bento' grid logic.
Ensure the 'Organizer Dashboard' uses a sidebar layout with a darker theme option.
For the 'Checkout' flow, use a multi-step form wizard (Step 1: Details, Step 2: Options, Step 3: Payment).
Use 'recharts' for the Elevation Profile component on Event Details pages.
